name: MO medium + 30 mM sodium lactate / 20 mM sodium sulfite (respiratory) (PMC8794893)
description: MO medium + 30 mM sodium lactate / 20 mM sodium sulfite (respiratory) — medium reported in PMC8794893 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC8794893 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.verification_evidence: Under respiratory conditions, 15 or 30 mM sodium lactate was added as the electron donor, and sodium sulfate (30 mM), sodium sulfite (10 or 20 mM) or sodium thiosulfate (10 or 20 mM) was added as the terminal electron acceptor.
